titleStmt.title: SII 26.417: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 417. (A.R. No. 396 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same verandah.

p.hi: Sakalalōkachakravartin Rājanārāyaṇa Śambuvarāya: Year 20, Makara (Tai) śu. 3, Wednesday, Tiruvōṇam = 1358 A.D. January 10, f.d.n. ·04. The tithi was Amāvāsyā.

summary.p: This inscription records that the Śrīmāhēśvaras, stānikars and the Kaikkōḷars of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēśam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Irāsādirāśa-vaḷanāḍu met in the temporary shed (kāvaṇam) called the Ponvāśi-koṇḍān in the temple of the god Tiruppulippagava-ṉāyaṉār of the place, to decide about a land. The land is stated to have been gifted as dēvadāna previously by a certain Puṅgūrkiḻāṉ Tavapperumāḷ alias Viśvaṉādēvar, a Māyēśvara of Tiruppuṉgūr and that the same was included in the government estate till the 17th year of the king and tax (irāśa-karam) was paid accordingly. The above-mentioned assembly arranged to get the land released from the royal holdings, and make it a taxfree land from the beginning of the 18th year of the king. This land then became the kāṇi of Viśvāṉadēvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . sakalalokaccakravatti Irācaṉārāyaṇaṉ campuvarāyaṟku yiyāṇṭu 2 10
makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu titikaiyum putaṉum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ Irācātirāca
vaḷaṉāṭṭu kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadecattu ciṟṟiṅkūr Uṭaiyār tiruppulippakavaṉāyaṉār
koyilil ponvācikoṇṭāṉ tirukkāvaṇattu Ādicaṇṭeśvaradevar Aruḷiceyal paṭikku
śrīmāheśvararum stānikarum kaikkoḷarum niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi tiruppuṉkūril
māyeśvararil puṅkūrkiḻāṉ tavapperumāḷāṉa viśvaṉātevar yiṉ nāyiṉāṟku paḻan tevatāṉamāy
kalnāṭṭāṉ paḻaṅkālukku meṟku Uṭpaṭṭa nilam tiṟappil kūṭi patiṉeḻāvatu varaiyum Irācakaram Iṟuttupo
tukaiyil patiṉeṭṭāvatu mutalukku mutal tuṭaṅki Iṟaiyilikkut tirumukamvāṅkit tarukaiyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar
Aruḷicceyalpaṭikku Aṉaivarum pirippaṭṭu pala tirukkaiyoṭṭiyum Itukku Aṭaitta
nācciyār tirukkaiyoṭṭiya teṉṉaruku teruvil ṉāyaṉār koyilukku tenmeṟku kku melaimaṉaiyi
kkolum Ivaṟku kāṇiyāvatākavum yittirukkaiyoṭṭikku paṭitarappaṭi ḷa 3 10kku tirumuṉ Oṭu mā2kku
ḷa5 la nikki ḷa �kku Uḷḷūr tirunāmattukkāṇi mutal yinta yiṟaiyiliyil kāṇiccavitam Aṭaittavatikku
raiyil cūraikkālukku vaṭakku vaṭakkil maṇaluṭaiyāṉ taṭi Oṉṟu ku100 9 10m puṟatta kāltaṭi 3 ṉāl ku 4 100 8 10 m pāyaṉ
taṭi Oṉṟu 7 10tika100ku 10 Ākattaṭi 5 mtikaḷ taṭikaḷ kār paccānam ku7 100 5 10 ṉāl nila Irumāvarai Āka yittirukkaiyo
ṭṭiyum Immaṉaiyaṭi kāṇiccivat m Ivaṟku kāṇiyāvatākavum Ivvakaip paṭi kāṇiyāṭci Uḷḷavai tāṉāti [ danma]
vikkiṟaiyaṅkaḷukku viṟṟoṟṟapaṭikku kiṟaiyaṅkaḷukkum Ukan=tatāvatākavum yittiruk kaiyoṭṭiya maṉai civita nilam Iv
vilaipaṭikku kāṇiyāṭci kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷumpaṭikku cantirātittavaraiyum cella tantom
perumāḷ viśvaṉātevaṟku Aruḷicceyalpaṭikku śrīmāyeśvararum stāṉattārum kaikkoḷarum Aṉaivarom
Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai § poṉavar puṭavai mutalukku §
Digital edition of SII 26.417 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
